gradeDescription: B = I practiced consistent good behaviour.
noteworthyComments:
Fun Friday was a blast! I practiced my sit-stays and worked really hard to hold them strong. The wind was CRAZY, so I tried my best to avoid it (not a fan of that part 😅), but I still got out there, got some fresh air, and made the most of it! I had challenges with my demand barking
today where breaks were needed
